title: Am I the asshole for breaking a kid’s nerf gun?
story:
I was walking home yesterday, and this kid started shooting me with the nerf gun while insulting me in front of his friends. I  ̶t̶o̶l̶d̶ warned him that if he does that again, I’ll break his nerf gun.

The next day, the kid does it again so I yank it out of his hand, and smash it on the pavement as hard as I fucking can, and pieces go flying everywhere. The kid starts crying in front of his friends, and I just walk back home. 

Am I the asshole? You decide.
